consensus_notes: All 5 workers agree: partial/failure handling is DEFINED in docs but has significant gaps in enforcement and recovery. Success gates on launched-not-completed counts. No automated retry. Monitor trusts self-reported telemetry without validation.
key_findings: SUCCESS THRESHOLD GAP: Success gates on workers_launched==250, not workers_completed. Post-launch crashes dont prevent success status.
NO RECOVERY: Zero automated retry/replacement for failed launches. Preflight is the only hard gate.
PARTIAL SCOPE LIMITED: partial status exists only at commander-bundle level, not at orchestrator run level.
BUNDLE MISSING TIMING: Final bundle has no started_at/completed_at/duration fields.
COUNT ACCURACY RISK: Metaswarm rollups trust commander self-report with no cross-validation against child-agents.jsonl.
ORPHAN INFLATION: 180s orphan recovery delay inflates claimed counts during agent death.
conflict_notes: Minor conflict: wkr-001 confidence 88 vs wkr-003 confidence 35 reflects that rules are well-documented but poorly enforced. No factual disagreement.
